01
Bokksu

Shopify Plus Platform Operations & Migration

Directed the full Shopify Plus organization migration consolidating five storefronts — including a complex payment infrastructure migration across Stripe, Braintree, Shopify Payments, and Recharge. Coordinated with Shopify Professional Services throughout. Managed a distributed dev team across multiple time zones for the duration. Also began migrating the Bokksu homepage from Builder.io to native Shopify sections before the role ended.

Live at sugoimart.com
02
Sugoi Mart

Homepage Redesign & Section Architecture

Builder.io was significantly hurting site speed on Bokksu storefronts. This project replaced it with a native Shopify section architecture — no third-party page builder, no performance overhead. Beyond speed, the new system unlocks dynamic personalization via customer tags and UTM parameters directly in Liquid, and lets the brand team schedule and update content in Theme Customizer without a dev ticket. Also shipped the full homepage redesign including a multi-slide hero carousel with per-slide scheduling and visibility rules.

Cursor / AI Coding Shopify Liquid Theme Architecture Dev Handoff Docs

03
Sugoi Mart

About Us & Why Choose Us Pages

Built from Figma designs using AI-assisted coding, these pages are fully owned by the brand team — no dev required for content updates, scheduling, or changes. Each section is a self-contained Liquid component configurable in Theme Customizer, streamlining day-to-day workflows for non-technical users while keeping layout and performance controlled in code.

Cursor / AI Coding Figma → Liquid Responsive

04
Sugoi Mart

Native Bundle Selector

My first foray into vibe coding — and it shipped to production. Built to replace a third-party app with a fully native solution: up to 3 collection-based bundle groups, per-group discount tiers, inventory validation, and automatic fallback logic. Integrates directly into the existing ATC flow with no breaking changes. Worked well enough that it was rolled out to Bokksu Boutique and Bokksu Market as well. Shipped with full developer handoff documentation built for easy extension.

Shopify Liquid + JS AOV Optimization App Replacement Live in Production
See it live →
05
Bokksu

International Order Tracking Widget

International shipping from Japan runs across multiple carriers — JP Post, OCS, OSM and others — each with inconsistent tracking visibility. Rather than forcing customers to decode raw carrier scans, this widget unifies all tracking APIs into a single branded experience with 7 human-readable states (Preparing → Delivered) plus a stalled overlay. Customers always know where their order is, regardless of which carrier has it — reducing WISMO tickets at the source.

HTML / CSS / JS CX Reduction Tool Multi-state UI Bokksu Branded

Storefront Layer
Cart + PDP upsell UI · Gift note modal · Quantity sync
Order Layer
SKU-driven cart · Line item properties · Shopify tags
Automation Layer
Shopify Flow · Alloy · CX triggers · Recharge sync
BIMS (Warehouse System)
Packing logic · Gift note printing · Washi box routing
Gift Wrap SKU Washi Box SKU Printed Notes Holiday 2025
06
Bokksu · Multi-storefront

Gift Wrap, Printed Notes & Washi Box Upsell System

A gifting upgrade system that previous ecommerce leaders at Bokksu never shipped. Customers see a simple upsell — gift wrapping, a personalized printed note, or a premium Washi Box packaging upgrade. Under the hood, it's a cross-system workflow spanning Shopify storefronts, Recharge, Shopify Flow, and BIMS (Bokksu's internal warehouse system).

The entire system is SKU-driven — each upsell is a discrete product in the cart, which keeps Shopify-native behavior intact and makes fulfillment instructions unambiguous. Gift note data is captured via modal, stored as structured line item properties, and routed to BIMS where warehouse operators print notes directly onto card stock via Locor RIP. No manual transcription, no interpretation errors.

Directed end-to-end: wrote functionality requirements, designed operational logic, coordinated dev implementation, and handled the BIMS integration spec. Also built UI prototypes using AI-assisted coding to help speed dev handoff.

Product Direction Shopify + Recharge Warehouse Integration Shopify Flow AOV Optimization Multi-storefront
About

Builder by habit,
operator by trade.

Started in customer experience and spent 7 years building up through operations into ecommerce at Bokksu — a Japanese DTC brand running six Shopify storefronts across subscription, marketplace, and wholesale models.

No formal technical background. Learned Shopify by running it, learned to code by shipping things. Recently started building production features with Cursor and AI-assisted coding — and writing the handoff docs afterward.

Also owned three mobile commerce apps — Sugoi Mart, Bokksu Boutique, and Bokksu Market — through a platform migration from Tapcart to Fuego.

Best in environments where there's real work to be done, not decks to be made.
